column1: yup! so when you do get on site youll be able to exchange your vouchers for your tickets / wristband etc
as we get closer to the trip you'll get emails from the system with a step by step on how to redeem everything you have, where to go, etc
we'll have on site staff there to assist you with things
Okay perfect. Just one more question. I was just curious as why the booking is through go blue tours and not spring break u?
Go Blue is our sister company. We operate together with operations teams and back ends
assuming you're referring to the system emails?
oh yea okay got you. thats alright, its how our booking system runs. we operate together under one roof
Hey man most of payments should be in today or tmr is that okay. Have a couple guys stressig bc in email it says u will be kicked from trip
Sup brotha, yea if they missed that 2nd payment they'll get that message. they able to get the $250 in? looked like only a few of the ppl
doesnt have to be the entire balance
Yes we will be able to get it in by later tn or tmr is that okay?
What is the address of the hotel we are staying at?
I was just curious as to if we could clarify a reservation before we all pay in full?
hey bro! its the Tru By Hilton Downtown

and your rooms are confirmed, ops team is still waiting on individual reservation confirmation numbers for all of our reservations. those become released once your room is paid in full, along with your vouchers, and other deeper info/directions
As far as your reservation goes tho everything is confirmed since you created your account and reserved with deposits, the guys just have to keep up with the payment plan to keep things in tact
Okay im just a little confused because we called that hotel and they said they have never heard of your guys company?
All of us want to pay in full but before that we would just like a little more confirmation
hey bro! was off yesterday, down to hop on a call today to chat about how it all works on a deeper level. just lmk what times work

overall tho, totally understand your concern with the resort being sold out, but I can rest assure youre all good despite that. we have you in reserved on our contracted room block. I can explain more on call so that you have a better understanding of your booking and the entire process
Hey sorry I had a busy day yesterday. I appreciate you getting back to me. Do you have any free time today or tmro?
All good bro. yea I have time today or tomorrow whichever works best for you. today I'm flexible for the most part, can hop on quick, and tomorrow after 12p
Does right now work for you?
Ryan what's good bro we keep missing eachother
Im around for the next half hour otherwise we can hop on tomorrow quick
Hey bro im available at any point today
Hey man, wanna jump on now quick? I have a ec
Hey man sorry just another question. When you go on go blue tours website to put in fort lauderdale for our dates it says no results available.
Sup bro, yea because our inventory is sold out with the current bookings we have
if someone was to cancel, then we'd have an opening and be able to go live again
but right now were all booked up to the amount of rooms we have on contract
Okay thanks bro sorry for all the questions
All good bro, I got you
yerr whats good bro, just checkin in. Ryan Miller is a little behind on payment just wanted to make sure hes good
Ill send him a text to remind him
Hey man I made my last payment but it charged my account twice
did it? I'll check it out
where do you see the double charge
Thank you I appreciate it. It appeared on my credit card statement for 2 charges at $250 dollars
what I see here at the moment is $499 on 11/18, $250 on 12/14, and $249 today 1/3
are you looking at the 2 last payments?
sorry I typed that out wrong. $200 on 11/18. $499 was the balance after that payment
Did you get the screenshot I sent you?
Yup I see it. Thanks for sending over
Since they both say pending, it hasn't been charged yet
If they both settle and become posted charges, let me know. I'll escalate to accounting
I've seen this before tho, one will settle and the other won't
But let me know if otherwise and we'll get you taken care of
hey bro! any word on Ryan M and DeAndre? theyre behind on payments
Ill shoot them a text right now
Hey Bro I believe we are all paid and if not should be by today. I was wondering what next steps are?
I was just curious as to if we get confirmation codes of where we are saying etc.
Morning brother apologies just realized my text above didnt send
we're waiting on payment from DeAndre if you can let him know. after that I'll check in with ops team to see where we are in the pre-departure process
Hey bro I believe deandre got his payment in today
yessir i see he got it in, let me hit up operations and see where things are at
All good if not I was just wondering if you heard anything from ops team?
Yo! Yea they haven't gotten to the next step on your reservation yet

Next up they go through and attach your rooms with the rooms we have contracted. Once that's done it's submitted to the hotel along with the other reservations. Once that's confirmed they then release the confirmation numbers onto your accounts. This is usually done in batches
This is the pre departure phase. Now that yall are all paid up that's what happens next
Okay sounds good . How long does this phase usually take?

Morning bro. I'll keep checking back on your res through the days to see when its updated. Our general policy is no less than 30 days before your trip. It'll be well well before then tho. Its a matter of our team getting through all of the up to date reservations in our manifest. Yours is in queue and I also put the note in that you guys were specifically asking as well
I'll def do what I can on my end to check periodically so that you know as soon as it is
Hey bro was just curious as to if you had any updates?
Hey bro! Ops team lmk they were actually working on tying up your reservation today
I've bugged them a few times about it lol. theyre following their pre departure process
We also got this email yesterday

Okay thanks for letting me know. You can honestly disregard that one. Its a system formality, but more applies to our international trips that come with airport transfer. The Fort Laudy package doesn't
Good Afternoon Bro. Was just curious to if you had any updates? Im also assuming its to late but was curious if we can still add ppl to trip?
I haven't heard anything back yet for confirmation codes but I know you've all been submitted on the room block
Just waiting for the code to be loaded to your account. Like if you were still lookin to call the hotel and stuff
And unfortunately we can't brooo we had sold out on the rooms we had like a few days after you got settled
Okay all good was just curious
Laudy tho there's tons of hotels nearby that your ppls can probably look at. Prices may be high tho
Liked “I haven't heard anything back yet for confirmation codes but I know you've all been submitted on the room block”
Okay thank you I appreciate it. Are we still on track for everything to be settled before 30 days before trip?
Yea we're about a week out from that at this point so gotta be!
Yall arrival date is the 15th so about a week
Okay thanks bro. Lmk if u hear any updates
Hey bro yea actually got word that all groups on our Laudy contracted rooms will be submitted to the hotel on Feb 15th
Okay and the hotel is the tru by hilton fort lauderdale downtown?
Okay and the hotel is the tru by hilton fort lauderdale downtown?
Just curious bc i have a few buddys that are going to try snd book the same hotel as us and there is only 1 room left and I just wanted to make sure before they book it
Hey Bro was just curious if you had any updates?
Sup bro, yea got word that our room block for the Tru has been submitted
Okay do we get confirmation codes now etc. I was also just curious about the maniac card and so on
Sorry for all the questions. Maybe it would be easier over phone. Do you gave any free time today to talk on the phone for a few minutes?
yea all good bro what times work for you
Okay shoot meet a call when your ready
Hey bro how is it going. Was just curious if the confirmation codes were updated to our reservation yet?

What's up brotha. Apologies on the late response, I didn't see the confirmation numbers on your account yet. I gave the resort a call myself to see where things were and they let me know they upload their reservations on a week to week basis since they have so many student travelers coming through our partners at Student Escape

On our end, everything has been submitted for the rooms we have on contract, your reservation is confirmed within the block. It's now a matter of the resort updating their reservation reports week by week

I wasn't aware that is how they handle it on their end. On our end everything has been submitted. You're more than welcome to call again with the inquiry and give them your names to see if they've updated things in their end
Overall though bro I can rest assured everything is booked and confirmed. Definitely nothing to worry about
Thank you bro, all good. I really appreciate you working with us through this reservation. Im sorry for all the extra questions haha
Of course my man. Y'all are gonna have a good time, wish I could be there but I'm stationed in Punta Cana
Hey bro sorry I just have one more question. I was just curious as to which maniac pass was included in our package out of these 3
Do we need to add our flights?
Yoyo! Nah you don't, I'm gonna get that bypassed in the morning. It's the case for most of our other groups but not for yours
Okay so we will still be able to view vouchers
yo! yea you will, is it still giving you the same alert?
you sure? works for me on my end. when was the last time you tried
Just tried and it worked. Is our mainic pass gonna be a voucher on the website or just included when we check in?
included when you check in. I already triple confirmed to make sure you get those
hey bro lmk if you need anything through the day today

Hey sorry bro one more question. When we get to hotel do we just show them that voucher and give them our names and we are good to check in? I called them a call earlier and our names are still not uploaded on the block yet and they were asking for a confirmation # but I didnt see one on the voucher

Hey brotha, yup! so screenshot or print your vouchers, bring it with you to the hotel. when you arrive there will be a Student Escape on site staff in the main lobby. Purple branding. you'll go to them directly to handle your check in process. they'll assist you the rest of the way
yea shoot me a text too if anything
Thank you bro will do. Set to land around 2:30
All checked in thank you brotha
Any suggestions for bars or anthing to do for the week?
Did they give you the manic pass and stuff?
No we have a student escape wristband they told us we have to go to backyard tn to get it?
Got you, yea def slide to backyard tn it's pretty lit
Nic from Love Island is at Rock Bar on the 17th. Should attract a lot of girls lol
We werent able to get maniac pass last night. Do you know where we can get?
They are saying that we need a qr code to scan?
Yo! Pretty sure they do it at Rock Bar. Who mentioned QR code
We did. At the maniac tent they said they didnt know anything abt it
Okay thank you lmk asap if you can
I just dont want to have to buy another one when it says it was included
Nooo you won't have to buy another
Gonna have Arnie meet up with you today
Tell him you're one of Spiffy's groups with Go Blue that got the Maniac VIP pass
He'll get you all hooked up
Thank you bro I appreciate it
Just met up with him and he got us all hooked up
I wanted to reach out once more to thank you for all of your assistance with planning this spring break trip. Your help, patience, and attention to detail are greatly appreciated.
Ryan brotha, that means a lot. I'm happy I got to help
